title: Membership Administration & Telemarketing Support (Student/Retiree Welcome)
description:
SID is looking for a service‑minded and confident communicator to support our membership renewal cycle and outreach to corporate leaders. In this role, you will assist with membership renewals and onboarding, maintain accurate records in our CRM system, and provide administrative support to ensure a smooth member experience. You will also conduct outbound calls to follow up with members, engage listed company chairs, and present the value of SID membership.

Key Responsibilities

Membership Renewal & Onboarding

  • Assist with membership renewal processing: reminders and confirmation.
  • Support onboarding of listed entity chairs
  • Maintain accurate membership records in the CRM system
  • Provide ad-hoc administrative support to ensure a smooth member experience.

2) Telemarketing & Outreach

  • Conduct outbound calls to:
    • Follow up with members for renewals.
    • Reach out to listed company chairs and prospects to explain SID’s membership benefits and encourage sign-up.
  • Clearly present SID’s value proposition and handle member questions or objections.
  • Record call outcomes accurately and flag follow-up needs to the Membership team.

Requirements

  • Diploma/Degree in any discipline
  • Prior experience in membership services, telemarketing, telesales, or customer service an advantage
  • Strong spoken communication skills; confidence speaking with senior executives an advantage.
  • Comfortable with outbound calls and achieving outreach goals.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office
  • Organised, service-minded, and able to work independently in a part-time capacity.

Work Arrangement

  • Students or Retirees with relevant experience also welcome to apply
  • Contract term: Approximately 3 months, aligned to SID’s membership renewal cycle
  • Hours: Part-time, e.g., 20–25 hours per week (flexible scheduling by agreement) during office hours between (9am to 6pm)
  • Work mode: On-site presence at SID’s office required

postedCompany.description:
The Singapore Institute of Directors (SID) is the national association of company directors for the local business community. SID promotes the professional development of directors and corporate leaders.  It works closely with the authorities and regulators, its network of members and professionals, such as accountants and lawyers, to identify ways to uphold and enhance the highest standards of corporate governance and ethical conduct.

Formed in 1998, the Institute now has over 3,000 members, comprising mainly directors of listed companies, industry leaders, accountants, lawyers and other professionals involved in the field of corporate governance. It has a 19-member Governing Council. Through its training programmes, it aims to increase the pool of persons who are suitable to serve as non-executive independent directors in listed companies. For more information about the Institute, please refer to www.sid.org.sg
postedCompany.name: SINGAPORE INSTITUTE OF DIRECTORS

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
